summary: Validated full AVANÇAR->modal->OK->minhas-inscricoes flow on inscricao-edital-04.html. All 5 scenarios PASS: (1) alert when cargo not selected, (2) alert when aceite not marked, (3) modal 'Inscrição realizada!' opens with data-testid=modal-ok, (4) OK redirects to /minhas-inscricoes.html with title, status 'Pendente de pagamento', cargo containing 'ANALISTA ADMINISTRATIVO', taxa 'R$ 160,00', pagar-inscricao button, and #cand-nome containing 'MARIA', (5) clicking pagar-inscricao makes pay-msg visible (block).
critical_code_review_comments: Modal listener attached with capture=true on BTN_Avancar; correctly calls preventDefault to avoid submit. Validation order (cargo before aceite) matches expected behavior.
minhas-inscricoes.html #cand-nome is set from URL param first (uppercased) and later overridden by /api/cadastro/{cpf} response — flow works even if backend fetch fails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fluxo AVANÇAR/modal/redirect verificado end-to-end. Botão Pagar inscrição é apenas placeholder (mostra #mi-paymsg). CMB_Cargo option values são IDs internos (e.g., 16311 = COD 04101). Header IDIB usa #cand-nome preenchido via query param nome (uppercased) e opcionalmente sobrescrito por /api/cadastro/{cpf}.
rca of the issue: N/A - all specified behaviors working as intended
